title: Forge Standard YAML
description: Frontmatter contract for .forge/standards/*.yaml files. additionalProperties:true at root because standards carry domain-specific body fields (e.g. transport.yaml has codegen, server_runtime ; state-management.yaml has framework, forbidden_alternatives). Phase 2 lifecycle invariants enforced by validate-standards-yaml.sh outside this schema (see ADR-J7-002 + ADR-J7-003 in j7-validate-standards-yaml/design.md). Reference: ADR-J7-004.

expires_at.$comment: Polymorphic via Phase-2 logic in validate-standards-yaml.sh : either ISO 8601 date or the literal 'never'. Schema-level type:string accepts both ; pattern enforced in the validator (FR-J7-005).

linter_rule.$comment: When string, MUST match ^[a-z][a-z0-9-]*$ (kebab-case). Pattern enforced in Phase-2 to keep schema-walker simple (FR-J7-007 + ADR-J7-002).

enforcement.$comment: Canonical fields are ci_blocking + pre_commit_hook (FR-J7-008). additionalProperties:true accommodates documented extensions (e.g. state-management.yaml's `activation_planned: "B.8 (T6)"` describing the planned warn→error transition). Tighten to false in a future J.7-extension once the extension vocabulary stabilises ; for now NFR-J7-002 (live tree GREEN) takes precedence.
